description: anvilml-worker: managed.rs/keepalive.rs ready-gated keepalive plus abort-on-Dead
context: RETROFIT, already implemented — see docs/TASKS_PHASE902.md §P902-A1 and .forge/reports/P902-A1_implement.md for full detail. keepalive::start() gained ready_rx:oneshot::Receiver<()>, awaited before the ping loop; ManagedWorker gained ready_tx:Option<oneshot::Sender<()>>, fired in run()'s Initializing->Idle arm. ready-timeout/child-exit/shutdown arms changed from drop to keepalive_handle.take().abort(). cargo test -p anvilml-worker --features mock-hardware exits 0.

RETROFIT, already implemented — see docs/TASKS_PHASE902.md §P902-A2 and .forge/reports/P902-A2_implement.md for full detail. keepalive.rs: Mutex<bool> shutdown flag replaced with tokio::sync::watch::channel(false); both loop wait points race a new wait_for_shutdown() helper via select!. managed.rs: keepalive_handle.take().abort() moved to immediately after HeartbeatHandle::shutdown(), before the Shutdown message/writer-wait. cargo test -p anvilml-worker --features mock-hardware exits 0.

description: anvilml-ipc/anvilml-worker: RecvError and per-message demux error handling
context: RETROFIT, already implemented — see docs/TASKS_PHASE902.md §P902-A3 and .forge/reports/P902-A3_implement.md for full detail. New RecvError enum in anvilml-ipc/src/error.rs (SocketClosed,MissingIdentityFrame,MissingPayloadFrame,DecodeFailed); RouterTransport::recv()/recv_with_raw_identity() return RecvError; impl From<RecvError> for AnvilError added. demux::start() breaks only on SocketClosed, logs+continues on the other three. cargo test --workspace exits 0.
